values: Simple list for discussion with the Tech team
Put all QPRO back offices in one system.
Less switching and fewer repeated logins.
Choose QPRO1, QPRO2, QPRO16 or another active brand from one page.
Hide or grey out brands and regions that are no longer used.
Prevents users choosing the wrong brand or market.
Show only the regions and languages used by each brand.
Put promo code, messages, inbox, dialogue, banner and rebate settings in one place.
The full setup can be completed on one page.
Show all important promo details together without long scrolling.
Important information is easier to check.
Link the correct inbox, dialogue and message to the promo code automatically.
Fewer missing or wrongly linked messages.
Show a full summary before the promo is saved or published.
Maker and checker can review everything together.
Give the promo maker and QC checker separate roles.
Do not allow a promo to go live until QC approves it.
Every promo is checked before launch.
Save the maker, checker, approver, date and time.
Easier follow-up when an issue happens.
Let checkers see the promos they checked before.
Useful for review, coaching and audits.
Record which fields were wrong and corrected during QC.
Shows common mistakes and training needs.
Do not allow saving when required information is missing.
Provide templates for common promos and blacklist messages.
Less copying and repeated setup work.
Use fields for bonus %, minimum deposit, turnover and validity.
Keeps wording consistent while details can change.
Copy a previous promo and change only the needed details.
Preview the banner, inbox, dialogue and promo page before launch.
Display issues can be fixed before publishing.
Show how the promo looks on desktop and mobile.
Keep important columns visible and make tables fit better.
Open full promo details in a pop-up window.
Easier to compare details during QC.
Put View, Edit and QC buttons beside the related promo.
Fewer wrong clicks and less scrolling.
Show live promo, cost and performance information in the BO.
Less manual daily and weekly reporting.
Choose a start and end date for reports.
Give stakeholders a view of the promo, cost and performance summary.
Fewer repeated report requests to Promo.
Download reports as Excel or CSV files.
Filter by brand, region, promo type, status, maker, checker and date.
Show Draft, Pending QC, Approved, Published, Expired or Deactivated.
Everyone can see the current promo stage.
Set rebate rules for slots, live casino and other game types in one setup.
No need to configure each game type separately.
Use clear and consistent names for rebate, turnover and bonus fields.
Users understand the fields more easily.
Add short help notes beside difficult fields, such as decimal percentages.
Show settings that the BO does not support.
Promo can explain system limits clearly.
Keep Blackjack under Live Casino and allow all Blackjack games to be blacklisted at once. New Blackjack games should be included automatically, with an option to exclude a specific game.
Fewer missed games and less manual selection.

preview: Put all QPRO back offices in one system.
Less switching and fewer repeated logins.
Choose QPRO1, QPRO2, QPRO16 or another active brand from one page.
Hide or grey out brands and regions that are no longer used.
Prevents users choosing the wrong brand or market.
Show only the regions and languages used by each brand.

values: Build one unified QPRO promotion workspace where the team can create, review, approve, preview, publish and report on promotions without moving between multiple modules or systems.
